# Copilot Instructions for Fluent UI React v9 Project

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Details
- **Type**: Vite + React with TypeScript
- **UI Framework**: Microsoft Fluent UI React v9
- **Purpose**: Setting up a modern React development environment with Fluent UI components

## Project Summary

This is a fully configured Fluent UI React v9 development environment with:

- ✅ Vite 7 build tool configured for React + TypeScript
- ✅ Fluent UI React v9 (@fluentui/react-components) installed
- ✅ Fluent UI Icons (@fluentui/react-icons) for comprehensive icon support
- ✅ Sample App.tsx with Fluent UI components (Card, Button, Title1, Text)
- ✅ FluentProvider with teamsLightTheme configured
- ✅ ESLint configured for code quality
- ✅ Project builds successfully with no errors
- ✅ Comprehensive README with setup instructions

## Available Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server (http://localhost:5173)
npm run build    # Build for production
npm run preview  # Preview production build
npm run lint     # Run ESLint
```

## Key Files

- `src/App.tsx` - Main application component with Fluent UI examples
- `src/App.css` - Application styles
- `src/main.tsx` - React entry point
- `README.md` - Project documentation

## Next Steps

1. Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
2. Open http://localhost:5173 in your browser
3. Explore Fluent UI components in the demo
4. Begin building your application components
5. Refer to [Fluent UI React Documentation](https://react.fluentui.dev/) for more components
